steps.title: Track the speakers' failure
steps.content: Each person tries to explain a conception of art, then sits down feeling the effort has "gone awry" for a reason the speaker "could not grasp." The point combines failed expression with confusion about why it failed.

steps.title: Reject invented attitudes
steps.content: A adds contempt, C adds a debate, and D claims they enjoy public speech and hate private speech; none appears in the text. The remaining choice states that each speaker fails to present a coherent vision and does not understand why. The answer is B.
